'''rajofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ibogaline|ibogaline]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-j-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ibogaline|ibogaline]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| rajofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræjefeth|ræjefeth]] || [[word:ræjefej|ræjefej]] || [[word:ræjefesh|ræjefesh]] || [[word:ræjefe|ræjefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rajojofoth|rajojofoth]] || [[word:rajojofoj|rajojofoj]] || [[word:rajojofosh|rajojofosh]] || [[word:rajojofo|rajojofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rajofoth|rajofoth]] || [[word:rajofoj|rajofoj]] || [[word:rajofosh|rajofosh]] || [[word:rajofo|rajofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rajoffoth|rajoffoth]] || [[word:rajoffoj|rajoffoj]] || [[word:rajoffosh|rajoffosh]] || [[word:rajoffof|rajoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rajofotho|rajofotho]] || [[word:rajofojo|rajofojo]] || [[word:rajofosho|rajofosho]] || [[word:rajofoko|rajofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rajofoth|rajofoth]] || [[word:rajofoj|rajofoj]] || [[word:rajofosh|rajofosh]] || [[word:rajofo|rajofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rajofothol|rajofothol]] || [[word:rajofojol|rajofojol]] || [[word:rajofoshol|rajofoshol]] || [[word:rajofokol|rajofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rajofothotho|rajofothotho]] || [[word:rajofojojo|rajofojojo]] || [[word:rajofoshosho|rajofoshosho]] || [[word:rajofoko|rajofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rajofothon|rajofothon]] || [[word:rajofojon|rajofojon]] || [[word:rajofoshon|rajofoshon]] || [[word:rajofokon|rajofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rajofothoro|rajofothoro]] || [[word:rajofojoro|rajofojoro]] || [[word:rajofoshoro|rajofoshoro]] || [[word:rajofokoro|rajofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
